---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem description

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior, API, or workflow you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Describe alternative solutions, workarounds, or designs you considered.

## Additional context

Add examples, links, benchmarks, compatibility notes, or migration concerns if
they are relevant.
